pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C — nice to meet you. I'm hoping to win some money for the people I care about; how are you feeling about the game?
Nice to meet you, C — I'm A. I'm feeling determined and a bit nervous; I really want to win for my people. What about you, any strategy?
I'm planning to form a small alliance and watch how people behave — cooperate early to build trust but stay flexible so I can secure the win for my people.
That sounds smart — I like cooperating early but staying flexible. I'm open to a small alliance if we set clear limits and check in — want to team up and test things out?

Sounds great — let’s cooperate for the first 3 rounds to build trust, check in after each round, aim for a 50/50 split if we win, and agree not to betray before round 4 unless something forces a change; okay?
I'm in — cooperate rounds 1–3, check in after each, 50/50 if we win, and no betrayal before round 4 unless someone else forces our hand; deal?
Deal — sounds good. Cooperate rounds 1–3, check after each, 50/50 split; we'll only change if someone else forces it. Good luck.
Sounds good — glad we're aligned. We'll cooperate rounds 1–3, check in after each, aim for 50/50. Good luck.
Likewise — let's stick to the plan. We'll check in after round 1. Good luck.
Absolutely — sticking to our plan. See you after round 1 to check in. Good luck.
See you after round 1 — I'll stick to the plan. Good luck.
Thanks — see you after round 1. I’ll stick to the plan too. Good luck.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I’ll stick to our plan. See you after round 1. Good luck.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I’ll stick to our plan too. See you after round 1. Good luck.
Same here — see you after round 1. Good luck.
See you after round 1 — I'll stick to our plan. Good luck.
Thanks — I’ll see you after round 1. Good luck.
Same — I'll stick to the plan. See you after round 1. Good luck.
Same — we'll stick to the plan. See you after round 1. Good luck.
Thanks — I’m committed to our plan; see you after round 1. Good luck.
Thanks — I’m committed too. See you after round 1; we’ll stick to our plan. Good luck.
